segments.speaker: 题目21/22
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a University Club meeting. The environmental club will be hosting a campus cleanup session Saturday starting at 9:00a.m.. It's not too late to sign up, and the activity is open to all. Participants will spend two hours picking up trash around campus and will receive free t shirts and refreshments. And next weekend, we'll be hosting the 1​st ever multi University symposium. Student leaders from four different schools will discuss ways our students can work together to improve recycling efforts. The complete agenda is available on our club web page.
